experience.title: Laboratory Manager
responsibilities: Managed laboratory operations, ensuring compliance with health and safety regulations.
Oversaw a team of 10 lab technicians and conducted performance reviews.
Developed protocols for testing and analysis of biological samples.
Coordinated with external vendors for laboratory supplies and equipment maintenance.
Maintained accurate records of laboratory activities and findings.

experience.title: Field Research Coordinator
responsibilities: Led field studies on environmental impacts of agricultural practices.
Collaborated with ecologists and biologists to collect and analyze data.
Presented research findings at scientific conferences and in peer-reviewed journals.
Trained new interns and volunteers in research methods and safety protocols.
